Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Being on a diet sucks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Maybe you didn't notice, but I look different than I used to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}When you go to a new school, you have to worry about where you'll sit, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It would suck if you ended up in the front row.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It sucks trying to make new friends when you transfer...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}You have to remember everybody's name, and you can't really say no to their offers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Exams suck, don't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}You have to study so much and your score gets posted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}And if you do bad, everyone will laugh at you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}That one about the girl who collapsed is already all over the school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I hope no one spreads any rumors about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It must suck to be a bully...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}You have to pretend to be nice so no one gets suspicious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}And if someone finds out, you'd have to be even nicer to them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It must suck being unconscious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I mean, you don't even know if you'll wake up or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Summer sucks, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I sweat so much my shirt gets drenched.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It must suck to be the "new girl."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}All the guys hit on you and pressure you right away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}But Aigis-san seems fine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}The culture festival kinda sucks, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I mean, there's always that one person who's so gung ho, and makes everyone else get involved.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}By the way, that person is NOT me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It sucks when a student passes away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}No matter what really happened, there's always rumors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}People completely forgot about that guy Aragaki now that they're studying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Or maybe they never cared about his death in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It must suck being from such an influential family.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I bet some people aren't sad at all about what happened... They just want to make a grab for power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}By the way, did you know the Kirijo Group built this school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I hope nothing bad happens...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}It must suck to move here from another country.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}You're always the center of attention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}But Mochizuki-kun seems to be enjoying it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}So many things happened during the school trip...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}People got all crazy and did things they wouldn't normally do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}For example, peeking at girls in the hot springs. That wasn't you, was it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}H-Hey, lighten up... I was just joking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Christmas sucks, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Behind all those presents, there's a vicious sales war raging.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}I wonder how many people commit suicide during Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}New Year's Day sucks, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Everyone expects you to make a resolution...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}...even though there's no way you'll keep it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Choosing a career sucks, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}...I'm serious this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 309}Shit, what should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}
